result.text: Scan: open-top vessel, shields deliberately down, music at {n:70-100} percent. Occupants' hair: cinematic. They are having a better day than most. Analyze the source of their joy, or match their energy?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

joy.text: Joy analysis: {n:40-70} percent sunshine, {n:20-40} percent the right song, remainder unexplained. Science wants to publish. Publish, or keep it folk knowledge?

publish.text: Findings submitted to the Journal of Obvious But Nice Things. Peer review: 'yeah.' Landmark work, Captain.

folk.text: Agreed — some knowledge belongs to the wind. The finding is released back into the wild.

match.text: Energy matched within safe parameters: windows cracked, volume up {n:8-20} percent. The convertible's crew flashed a peace sign. Contact successful.
